summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Medikal Africa website redesign - all 8 test criteria passed successfully. The minimalist, technical design matches the required Supabase/Vercel/Linear aesthetic with excellent mobile responsiveness and complete functionality.
passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with hero section, stats, partner logos, platform overview, AMR preview, and CTA sections
Navigation works perfectly - all 5 pages accessible (Home, Platform, AMR Intelligence, Technology, Research)
Request Access page renders correctly with functional form containing all required fields and validation
Mobile responsiveness works flawlessly - hamburger menu opens/closes correctly across all breakpoints
All pages have proper styling with no broken layouts - consistent minimalist design throughout
Data-testid attributes present on all key elements with 100% coverage for testing automation
CSS animations work correctly - 18 fade-up elements, hover effects, data flow animations, AMR heatmap
All navigation links work correctly between pages with proper URL routing
Typography uses Inter font family with proper weights and spacing
Color scheme follows brand guidelines with teal primary color (#5EC4D5)
Responsive grid layouts adapt properly from desktop (2-column) to tablet (1-column) to mobile
Form functionality complete - all input fields, dropdowns, and textarea work correctly
No JavaScript errors detected during testing
Professional minimalist aesthetic achieved matching tech company standards
Performance is excellent with fast loading times
